arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Insights: Insights: How Villa went for broke
arts.sum: UEFA Technical Observer Michael O'Neill explains how Aston Villa changed their gameplan in pursuit of a comeback victory against Paris.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery piles pressure on Newcastle United ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has acknowledged Newcastle's impressive form ahead of their pivotal Premier League showdown at Villa Park this Saturday and even claimed they are favourites for a place in the Champions League. Villa, fresh from a Champions League exit despite a valiant 3-2 victory over Paris St Germain, are setting sights on European qualification, with the upcoming match against third-placed Newcastle crucial for their ambitions.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sends Aston Villa warning ahead of match with fellow Champions League chasers
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Newcastle United on Saturday in a game where the Magpies, despite Eddie Howe's absence, are in outstanding form and have forced their way to the front of the Champions League fight

arts.ttl: Nick Pope on 'driver' that is helping Newcastle United's Champions League dream
arts.sum: Nick Pope admits that Eddie Howe's illness has proved to be a big "driver" for Newcastle United to push on and qualify for the Champions League this season. Given the squad have been together for the last three seasons and have already qualified for one Champions League campaign, Pope knows it is about stay calm and tapping into the rich experience in the dressing room.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Emery says Newcastle ‘similar level’ to PSG
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has said Newcastle are a similar level to Paris Saint-Germain ahead of his team’s crunch clash with the Magpies this weekend. Villa take on Newcastle in a huge fixture this weekend, as both teams battle for Champions League qualification. arts.ttl: Talks held: Chelsea & Newcastle contact Bundesliga star’s agent over potential transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United are reportedly pursuing a potential summer transfer window swoop for Bayern Munich centre-back Kim Min-jae. The South Korea international has not quite been at his best since joining Bayern, despite previously impressing a great deal in spells at Napoli and Fenerbahce. arts.ttl: Paul Mitchell summer activity was blasted but quiet Newcastle United signing shows £50.7m worth
arts.sum: "I think you have to give credit to James Bunce and Dan Hodges, the medical team and sports science team, for that as well because they play a big part in making sure that these lads are able to go out there and deliver the type of performances that's expected and that we want. Speaking at his pre-Aston Villa press conference on Friday, Jason Tindall praised Bunce - and sports science chief Dan Hodges - for their work of late in ensuring Newcastle can navigate a busy period while still playing with ferocious intensity.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Newcastle make contact with Kim Min-jae’s entourage
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United have made contact with the entourage of Bayern Munich centre-back Kim Min-jae (28), according to a report from Foot Mercato. Min-jae, two years after joining Bayern Munich…

arts.ttl: Yankuba Minteh breaks Newcastle United silence as transfer record set straight
arts.sum: "I know other clubs are interested in me, so if I don’t play there, then it’s an opportunity to play for another team. I said: ‘OK, if they want to sell me, then it’s fine.
